query:
SELECT 
  action,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  MIN(createdAt) as first_occurrence,
  MAX(createdAt) as last_occurrence
FROM audit_logs
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
GROUP BY action
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
